<thought>

</thought>

<thought>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. If I move forward I would hit a wall at E, so I need to change direction. The goal is below at row 04 column D, and the cell beneath me at row 03 column D is safe, so I should turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>

</thought>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The goal is directly ahead at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe, so I should move forward.
